name: Jamaican Oxtails
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oxtails in a large bowl. Add sliced onion and soy sauce. Mix well.
2. Refrigerate at least 2 hours.
3. Combine flour, salt, and pepper. Dredge oxtails in the mixture, making sure all sides are covered. Reserve the onion.
4. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven until hot. Brown the oxtails.
5. Remove meat from the pan and drain off all but 1-2 tablespoons of oil.
6. Add reserved onion, tomato, bell pepper, chile, and garlic to the pan and sauté lightly, scraping up brown bits.
7. Add hot water and molasses and stir well. Return oxtails to the pan.
8. Cook over low heat for 1-1/2 hours. Add thyme sprig and continue to cook for an additional 30 minutes.
